abap_snippet: @AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'ZVSALESANL' @EndUserText.label: 'Sales Analytics' define view Z_I_SalesAnalytics as select from vbak as Header inner join vbap as Item on Header.vbeln = Item.vbeln { key Header.vbeln as SalesOrder, key Item.posnr as ItemNumber, Header.auart as OrderType, Item.netwr as NetValue, case when Item.netwr > 100000 then 'HIGH' else 'NORMAL' end as SalesCategory }
gaps: Confidence capped because material behavior is omitted, simplified, or delegated outside SQL.
No client filtering required or handled at application layer
generated_sql_snippet: CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW Z_I_SALESANALYTICS AS SELECT Header.VBELN AS SALESORDER, Item.POSNR AS ITEMNUMBER, Header.AUART AS ORDERTYPE, Item.NETWR AS NETVALUE, CASE WHEN Item.NETWR > 100000 THEN 'HIGH' ELSE 'NORMAL' END AS SALESCATEGORY FROM VBAK AS Header INNER JOIN VBAP AS Item ON Header.VBELN = Item.VBELN
